items.title: FDA panel supports access to peptides over scientist objections
items.description: Vote is first step in broadening public access to so-called Wolverine peptide despite warnings about risks

items.title: Intel shares rally after chipmaker posts fastest growth in 15 years
items.description: Chipmaker’s revenue jumped 25% in the second quarter

items.title: Trump’s dubious nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
items.description: An accord lacking ‘gold standard’ safeguards on enrichment would carry proliferation risks

items.title: US justice department to streamline company merger reviews
items.description: Change entails focusing on top competition concerns in a deal rather than expansive probes and fact-finding missions

items.title: The US needs a new Manhattan Project for fusion energy
items.description: If we are to outpace China and own the future of this technology, we must fund it properly

items.title: Laura Loomer meets Zelenskyy after pro-Ukraine conversion
items.description: Far-right influencer abandoned opposition to war to praise Kyiv’s resilience against Russian aggression

items.title: US oil refineries run at breakneck speeds as wars choke fuel supplies
items.description: High utilisation rates create risks of outages at a time when fuel prices are already up sharply
